items.title: Hollander POTD Larry Bird. Larry Legend was 6th pick in 78, stayed another yr & was ROY in 79-80. Dominated immediately, was 12x all-star, 10x all-NBA, 3x MVP. HOFer & Top 75. This bio is from after 87-88, the last yr of his prime. 4th quarter of Game 7 v Nique was amazing.

6-of-6 shooting 
4 of 4 from 3
5 rebounds
6 assists 
1 steal 
1 block
